{{ avatar() }}

*A static mirror of the public Telegram channel [@vitaly_zdanevich_chan](https://t.me/vitaly_zdanevich_chan), generated by [tg2zola](https://github.com/vitaly-zdanevich/telegram_channel_to_static_website).*

<https://about.me/zdanevich>  

Software Engineer, from Belarus, from 2022 living in Sakartvello (Georgia country UTC+4). Working with Golang, AWS. Program in Vim. Love Gentoo Linux. Respect free and open software. Contributor to Wikipedia and other projects.

**21** subscribers · **1.35K** photos · **186** videos · **31** files · **968** links

The site occupies **632 MB** — **62%** of the [1 GB GitHub Pages limit](https://docs.github.com/en/pages/getting-started-with-github-pages/about-github-pages#usage-limits).

By kind:

- **Videos** 487 MB
- **Images** 144 MB
- **Text** 1.1 MB
- **Other** 5.4 KB

Generated in **1m 23s**.

Source repository: [https://github.com/vitaly-zdanevich/telegram_channel_to_static_website](https://github.com/vitaly-zdanevich/telegram_channel_to_static_website)

**No Telegram bot, token, or API is needed** — the site is built from the public web preview, with all media downloaded locally, so it keeps working even if the channel is removed.

<ul class="commits"><li title="- Calendar: size day cells by post count (1 / 2 / 3+ posts)&#10;- Calendar: hover tooltip lists the day's tags, one per line&#10;- Day pages: localized &quot;Newer day&quot; / &quot;Older day&quot; nav (12 langs)&#10;- Tags nav: plain text on the /tags/ list page (link elsewhere)&#10;- Wider spacing between the top nav links&#10;&#10;Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 &lt;noreply@anthropic.com&gt;"><a href="https://github.com/vitaly-zdanevich/telegram_channel_to_static_website/commit/7ec569d11acbd52036ceb279513a4ef9994846f1"><code>7ec569d</code></a> Calendar polish + nav tweaks (v0.19.0) <span class="cdate">2026-06-30</span></li></ul>
